summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sarver Landscape QA system iteration 10 features: Dynamic Rubric Matrices CRUD API endpoints, Crew App icon tabs, Strict mobile-only Rapid Review UI, and Dark theme visibility fixes. All 18 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
test_credentials: Used GM (gm@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!), Owner (owner@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!), Supervisor (supervisor@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!), and Production Manager (production.manager@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!) from /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed rubric matrices during backend testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 validated all requested features: (1) GET /api/rubric-matrices returns all active rubrics with division field, (2) GET /api/rubric-matrices?division=Install filters correctly, (3) POST /api/rubric-matrices creates new rubric (GM/Owner only), (4) PATCH /api/rubric-matrices/{id} updates rubric fields (GM/Owner only), (5) DELETE /api/rubric-matrices/{id} soft-deletes (deactivates) rubric (GM/Owner only), (6) Non-GM/Owner (Supervisor, PM) cannot create/update/delete rubric matrices (403), (7) Quick Matrix Ref table renders on dashboard with division filter, (8) Crew capture page icon tabs render correctly (Camera, BookOpen, Wrench icons), (9) Rapid Review page renders as clean mobile-first layout (no queue strip, no side panel), (10) Rapid Review swipe buttons (Fail, Concern, Standard, Exemplary) are visible, (11) Rapid Review comment modal appears for Fail/Exemplary ratings, (12) Dark theme toggle works on Rapid Review page.

rubric_matrices_crud.get_all_rubrics: PASS - returns list with division field
